'''Leeno''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who was assigned to join [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] fleet during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], Leeno was a rating who joined [[Patrol 341]] on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], led by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Aagon]]. He was the [[gunner/Legends|gunner]] at the front of the [[skimmer/Legends|skimmer]] [[Zeta 19|Z-19]] and his [[pilot/Legends|helmsman]] was [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Forley]].<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref> 

The patrol deserted its position in order to have fun hunting some indigenous [[Bouncer]]s, when it was attacked by a collection of settlers. Aagon and his troops exited the skimmer while Forley was ordered to round the rocks and pin the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. Leeno at first shot randomly at the rocks, until Sergeant Forley had the idea of concentrating on certain rocks and make them explode in order to force the Rebels out of their hiding.<ref name="JK" />

After some time there was no visible result, while the two realised they lost their last [[speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] escort, while Aagon was not replying; [[Kyle Katarn]] led the Rebels behind the troops and had killed the Lieutenant. While Forley was contemplating their next move, Leeno saw a bouncer behind him, which immobilized the Sergeant and swallowed his head. In his panic, Leeno swiveled the cannon around and shot, killing both of them.<ref name="JK" />

Realizing what he did, and the grotesque image haunting his mind, he jumped out and ran screaming. The bouncers who were around fell on him and threw him down. Two [[standard minute/Legends|minutes]] later [[Grif Grawley]] and two Rebels followed his screams and found him.<ref name="JK" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' {{1st}}
